variants: Daren Coates is a graduate of Quartz Hollow Institute, where he developed a strong foundation in the Catalan text, which he now utilizes in his role at Blackbriar Milling. In addition to his work in the milling industry, Daren is actively involved as the Citizen Liaison for Starlight Education Fund, where he focuses on supporting educational initiatives in the community. His writing talents have also led to publications in Nomad Blossom House, showcasing his commitment to the written word and storytelling.
